title: aspidosperma riedelii subsp. oliganthum
intro: Aspidosperma riedelii subsp. oliganthum, also known as the 'Riedel's Aspidosperma', is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly as a source of the alkaloid yohimbine, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Aspidosperma riedelii subsp. oliganthum include its potential to improve sexual function, increase muscle mass, and aid in weight loss. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by extracting the yohimbine alkaloid through methods such as solvent extraction or distillation, which can be used to create supplements, tinctures, or other medicinal products.
